# Aishwarya Sudhakar

> Portfolio of Aishwarya Sudhakar, UCLA MSBA'26 candidate working at the intersection of data and operations.

Aishwarya defines frameworks, sets metrics, and ships AI-augmented workflows. Background includes Uber (city-scale shuttle networks for enterprise clients) and freelance/consulting work.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Bio, work experience, skills, certifications, hackathons, and contact links.
